data.title: Coinbase to List PYTH
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Coinbase will add support for Pyth Network (PYTH) on the Solana network. Do not send this asset through other networks, otherwise funds may be lost. 
If liquidity conditions are met, trading will begin on or after 9 am (Pacific Time) on February 20, 2025. Once the supply of this asset is sufficient, the PYTH-USD trading pair will be launched in stages. Support for PYTH may be limited in some supported jurisdictions.

data.title: In the past 24 hours, the entire network has liquidated $134 million, and the liquidation amount of ETH exceeds that of BTC
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Coinglass data shows that in the past 24 hours, the entire network has been liquidated for $134 million, and a total of 68,503 people have been liquidated; among them, long orders have been liquidated for $55.3304 million, and short orders have been liquidated for $78.3248 million.
ETH liquidated $23.4063 million, exceeding BTC (liquidated $21.8535 million).

data.title: Coinbase Chief Policy Officer Urges Congress to Give CFTC Crypto Spot Market Oversight
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Coinbase Chief Policy Officer Faryar Shirzad drafted a two-page proposal urging the U.S. Congress to act quickly to introduce regulatory clarity and consumer protection for cryptocurrency users. Shirzad outlined six legislative priorities, including granting the CFTC full power over the cryptocurrency spot market. 
Shirzad wrote: "Digital assets such as Bitcoin and Ethereum are commodities, not securities. Legislation must authorize the CFTC to oversee the cryptocurrency spot market, ensure transparency and protect consumers from fraud and manipulation." Although the move will greatly weaken the SEC's regulatory power over digital assets, Shirzad said the agency still plays an important role. 
He said Congress must "enact the SEC's financing rules" to provide developers with "a clear way to raise funds for blockchain projects, rather than treating every token as a security." (Cointelegraph)

data.title: USDC Treasury Issues Over 53 Million Tokens on Ethereum
data.description: According to Odaily, Whale Alert has reported that at 1:06 AM UTC+8, the USDC Treasury minted 53,694,999 USDC tokens on the Ethereum blockchain.

data.title: Ethereum network transaction fees fell 70% week-on-week, hitting a four-year low
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News On February 15, the 7-day moving average (7DMA) of Ethereum network transaction fees fell to $0.77. Just a week ago, the figure was $2.57, which means a 70% drop from the previous week.
This drop has brought its transaction costs to the lowest level (in US dollars) in more than four years (July 2020). Meanwhile, Bitcoin network activity recently hit a 12-month low, with the number of transactions down 55% from its peak.
Ethereum's median gas fee (in Gwei) further confirms this trend. Over the past week, the average daily gas fee was 1.61 Gwei, with the lowest value occurring on February 15 at 1.19 Gwei.
In addition, the 7DMA of Ethereum's on-chain transaction volume fell to just $4.19 billion last Saturday, down 46% from the previous week. This is Ethereum's lowest daily transaction volume since the US presidential election on November 7. (The Block)

data.title: pump.fun deposited 65,122 SOL to Kraken 3 hours ago, and deposited more than $247 million in SOL this year
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, 3 hours ago, pump.fun deposited 65,122 SOLs worth $10.97 million to Kraken.
In 2025, it sent a total of 1,235,043 SOLs worth $247.52 million.
Overall, pump.fun has earned 2,930,093 SOLs, currently worth $495.36 million.

data.title: SEC Reviews 21Shares' Spot ETH ETF Staking Application
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on February 20, the United States Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has accepted the application from 21Shares for its spot Ethereum (ETH) exchange-traded fund (ETF) staking proposal.

data.title: USDC Treasury issued approximately 53.7 million USDC on the Ethereum chain early this morning
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Whale Alert monitoring, at 1:06 Beijing time, USDC Treasury issued 53,694,999 USDC on the Ethereum chain.

data.title: Trump: Tariffs on cars, semiconductors, chips, pharmaceuticals and possibly lumber will be announced within a month or sooner
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: US President Trump said that he will announce tariffs on automobiles, semiconductors, chips, pharmaceuticals and possibly timber in the next month or earlier. (Jinshi)

data.title: Coinbase Prime now supports Bittensor (TAO) custody
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Coinbase Prime now supports Bittensor (TAO) custody. The availability of this asset may be restricted by the custody entity and customer jurisdiction.
